column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Bolshevik Island Vegetation Plots
Dataset Reference: Matveyeva N. V. Vegetation of the southern part of Bolshevik Island (Severnaya Zemlya archipelago) // Vegetation of Russia. 2006. N 8. P. 3–87.
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Bolshevik Island

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the old Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale: r (single), + (less than 1 percent), 1 (1 to 5 percent), 2 (6 to 25 percent), 3 (26 to 50 percent), 4 (51 to 75 percent), and 5 (76 to 100 percent). Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
